Mike Henig, the owner of Montgomery, Alabama-based Henig Furs, said ‌Amazon should have realized the ⁠foreign manufacturers were able to charge below-market prices by fraudulently avoiding import tariffs and fees between 2007 and 2024, and violated the ⁠False Claims Act by shortchanging the federal government.

items.title: Oil retreats, stocks rise on cautious Mideast war hopes
items.summary: Oil prices slid and European stock markets advanced Wednesday after a South Korean tanker passed through the Strait of Hormuz, easing  concerns about the apparent impasse between the US and Iran on ending the war in the Middle East.It was the first transit by a South Korean vessel through the key waterway since the Iran war began at the end of February.
